# All testcases can be generated by the following command:
# jtreg -l jdk/test/jdk

# FIXME: Currently only a subset of `io`, `lang`, and `net` tests are added, due to:
# 1. Some tests are inherently failing because certain kernel features are not yet supported;
# 2. Even if individual tests pass, running more testcases increases the probability of
#    failures caused by JVM or Ext2 errors.

# java/io/BufferedInputStream
# java/io/BufferedReader
# java/io/BufferedWriter
# java/io/ByteArrayInputStream
# java/io/ByteArrayOutputStream
# java/io/CharArrayReader
# java/io/charStreams
